nasb.text: Their widows will be more numerous before Me Than the sand of the seas; I will bring against them, against the mother of a young man, A destroyer at noonday; I will suddenly bring down on her Anguish and dismay.

esv.text: I have made their widows more in number than the sand of the seas; I have brought against the mothers of young men a destroyer at noonday; I have made anguish and terror fall upon them suddenly.

cnv.text: 我使他們寡婦的數目 比海沙還多； 我使行毀滅的在午間臨到我的子民， 打擊年輕人的母親， 使痛苦的驚恐忽然臨到她們身上。

ccb.text: 我要使他们的寡妇比海沙还多， 使毁灭者在午间突然夺取青年的性命， 以致母亲们陷入痛苦、惊恐中。
